_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Translate proposed capabilities into technical requirements.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to design technical implementations that balance immediate delivery requirements with long-term maintainability, scalability, and operational sustainability.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-A-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-001 (TF, cosine: 0.614), LS-S-003 (LS, cosine: 0.536).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.5/10 (raw 0.549). Shared vocabulary: [requirements, technical]. DCWF-only terms [capabilities, proposed, translate] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, balance, delivery, design, immediate, implementations] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.869 (P=0.892, R=0.848). P exceeds R by 0.044 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Translate proposed capabilities into technical requirements." and "Ability to design technical implementations that balance immediate delivery requ" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.616 > STS 0.549 (gap +0.066). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [requirements, technical] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.1%. Shared tokens: [requirements, technical]. DCWF-only: [capabilities, proposed, translate]. WIDAI-only: [ability, balance, delivery, design, immediate, implementations].

signals.detail: STS 0.549 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
